title: ÜSSAM (Strategic Studies Application and Research Center) Boards
content:

Dr. Nuh Yılmaz- Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Head of the Center for Strategic Studies

Dr. Amr Abdalla- UN University for Peace (UPEACE)

Dr. Jiuzhou Duan - Tsinghua University, China

Dr. Neil Melvin- Royal United Services Institute, UK

Dr. Tatushi Arai- Kent State University, USA

Enzo Ikah - Peace Activist

Eser Girit Tümer- President of Artificial Intelligence Technology Association
